title: StaffML Corpus North Star
thesis: The corpus size is DERIVED, not chosen. It follows from three principled constraints: topics (79), applicability (230 valid pairs), and zone capacity (3-5 per cell).

topics.rationale: Minimum spanning set of ML systems knowledge for Staff-level engineers, organized into 13 competency areas

applicability.rationale: Each exclusion is physics-grounded — the concept has no physical substrate on that hardware tier

simple_zones.rationale: Limited distinct scenarios — finite facts, napkin math combos, pairwise comparisons

complex_zones.rationale: More angles available — different failure modes, constraint sets, architectural patterns

mastery_zone.rationale: Most complex zone combining all four skills — supports the most variation

post_generation_priorities: VALIDATION: Verify every question's math, hardware specs, and logical consistency
DEDUP: Remove near-duplicate questions in overfilled cells (>capacity)
QUALITY CURATION: Replace weak questions rather than adding more
CAPACITY UPGRADE: Fill mastery/realization/analyze cells to full capacity
